name: Chocolate Cherry Oatmeal Fancies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Spread almonds on a baking sheet and bake for 5 minutes or until golden brown. Cool completely.
2. Grease baking sheets with shortening. Place sheets of foil on countertop for cooling cookies.
3. Combine shortening, brown sugar, egg, milk, vanilla, and almond extract in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
4. Combine oats, flour, baking soda, and salt. Mix into the creamed mixture at low speed just until blended. Stir in white chocolate, semisweet chocolate, cherries, and reserved almonds.
5. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls (15 mL) of dough 2 inches (5 cm) apart onto greased baking sheet.
6. Bake one baking sheet at a time for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly browned. Do not overbake. Cool for 2 minutes on the baking sheet, then remove cookies and place them on foil to cool completely.
Makes: About 4 dozen cookies
